name: Vicapsys Life Sciences, Inc.
summary: Vicapsys Life Sciences, Inc. is a Florida-incorporated biopharmaceutical holding company developing encapsulated product candidates incorporating proprietary derivatives of the chemokine CXCL12 to create immunoprotection zones around cells, tissues, organs, and devices. Its lead product line VICAPSYN targets transplantation therapies including Type 1 Diabetes treatment via encapsulated human islet cell clusters. A second line, VYBRIN, addresses anti-fibrotic applications including post-surgical adhesion prevention, implantable device coating, and diabetic wound healing.

products.name: VICAPSYN
products.description: Proprietary encapsulated product candidates using CXCL12 derivatives for transplantation therapies and stem-cell applications, with lead application in Type 1 Diabetes treatment via encapsulated human islet cell clusters.

products.name: VYBRIN
products.description: CXCL12-based product candidate line targeting anti-fibrotic applications including post-surgical adhesion prevention, implantable device coating, and diabetic ulcer wound healing.

partnerships.description: Exclusive, royalty-bearing worldwide license under Patent Rights for coating and transplanting cells, tissues, and devices for therapeutic purposes, with milestone and royalty payment obligations.
